translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Paul and Timothy, servants of Jesus Christ; To all the saints in Christ Jesus who are at Philippi, with the overseers  and servants :

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Grace to you, and peace from God, our Father, and the Lord Jesus Christ.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I thank my God whenever I remember you,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: always in every request of mine on behalf of you all making my requests with joy,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: for your partnership  in furtherance of the Good News from the first day until now;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: being confident of this very thing, that he who began a good work in you will complete it until the day of Jesus Christ.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It is even right for me to think this way on behalf of all of you, because I have you in my heart, because, both in my bonds and in the defense and confirmation of the Good News, you all are partakers with me of grace.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For God is my witness, how I long after all of you in the tender mercies of Christ Jesus.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: This I pray, that your love may abound yet more and more in knowledge and all discernment;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: so that you may approve the things that are excellent; that you may be sincere and without offense to the day of Christ;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: being filled with the fruits of righteousness, which are through Jesus Christ, to the glory and praise of God.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Now I desire to have you know, brothers,  that the things which happened to me have turned out rather to the progress of the Good News;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: so that it became evident to the whole palace  guard, and to all the rest, that my bonds are in Christ;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and that most of the brothers in the Lord, being confident through my bonds, are more abundantly bold to speak the word of God without fear.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Some indeed preach Christ even out of envy and strife, and some also out of good will.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The former insincerely preach Christ from selfish ambition, thinking that they add affliction to my chains;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: but the latter out of love, knowing that I am appointed for the defense of the Good News.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: What does it matter? Only that in every way, whether in pretense or in truth, Christ is proclaimed. I rejoice in this, yes, and will rejoice.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For I know that this will turn out to my salvation, through your supplication and the supply of the Spirit of Jesus Christ,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: according to my earnest expectation and hope, that I will in no way be disappointed, but with all boldness, as always, now also Christ will be magnified in my body, whether by life, or by death.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For to me to live is Christ, and to die is gain.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But if I live on in the flesh, this will bring fruit from my work; yet I don’t know what I will choose.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But I am in a dilemma between the two, having the desire to depart and be with Christ, which is far better.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yet, to remain in the flesh is more needful for your sake.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Having this confidence, I know that I will remain, yes, and remain with you all, for your progress and joy in the faith,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: that your rejoicing may abound in Christ Jesus in me through my presence with you again.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Only let your way of life be worthy of the Good News of Christ, that, whether I come and see you or am absent, I may hear of your state, that you stand firm in one spirit, with one soul striving for the faith of the Good News;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and in nothing frightened by the adversaries, which is for them a proof of destruction, but to you of salvation, and that from God.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Because it has been granted to you on behalf of Christ, not only to believe in him, but also to suffer on his behalf,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: having the same conflict which you saw in me, and now hear is in me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: If there is therefore any exhortation in Christ, if any consolation of love, if any fellowship of the Spirit, if any tender mercies and compassion,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: make my joy full, by being like-minded, having the same love, being of one accord, of one mind;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: doing nothing through rivalry or through conceit, but in humility, each counting others better than himself;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: each of you not just looking to his own things, but each of you also to the things of others.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Have this in your mind, which was also in Christ Jesus,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who, existing in the form of God, didn’t consider equality with God a thing to be grasped,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: but emptied himself, taking the form of a servant, being made in the likeness of men.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: And being found in human form, he humbled himself, becoming obedient to death, yes, the death of the cross.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Therefore God also highly exalted him, and gave to him the name which is above every name;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: that at the name of Jesus every knee should bow, of those in heaven, those on earth, and those under the earth,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and that every tongue should confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: So then, my beloved, even as you have always obeyed, not only in my presence, but now much more in my absence, work out your own salvation with fear and trembling.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For it is God who works in you both to will and to work, for his good pleasure.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Do all things without murmurings and disputes,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: that you may become blameless and harmless, children of God without defect in the middle of a crooked and perverse generation, among whom you are seen as lights in the world,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: holding up the word of life; that I may have something to boast in the day of Christ, that I didn’t run in vain nor labor in vain.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yes, and if I am poured out on the sacrifice and service of your faith, I rejoice, and rejoice with you all.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: In the same way, you also rejoice, and rejoice with me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But I hope in the Lord Jesus to send Timothy to you soon, that I also may be cheered up when I know how you are doing.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For I have no one else like-minded, who will truly care about you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For they all seek their own, not the things of Jesus Christ.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But you know the proof of him, that, as a child serves a father, so he served with me in furtherance of the Good News.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Therefore I hope to send him at once, as soon as I see how it will go with me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But I trust in the Lord that I myself also will come shortly.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But I counted it necessary to send to you Epaphroditus, my brother, fellow worker, fellow soldier, and your apostle and servant of my need;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: since he longed for you all, and was very troubled, because you had heard that he was sick.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For indeed he was sick, nearly to death, but God had mercy on him; and not on him only, but on me also, that I might not have sorrow on sorrow.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have sent him therefore the more diligently, that, when you see him again, you may rejoice, and that I may be the less sorrowful.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Receive him therefore in the Lord with all joy, and hold such in honor,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: because for the work of Christ he came near to death, risking his life to supply that which was lacking in your service toward me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Finally, my brothers, rejoice in the Lord. To write the same things to you, to me indeed is not tiresome, but for you it is safe.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Beware of the dogs, beware of the evil workers, beware of the false circumcision.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For we are the circumcision, who worship God in the Spirit, and rejoice in Christ Jesus, and have no confidence in the flesh;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: though I myself might have confidence even in the flesh. If any other man thinks that he has confidence in the flesh, I yet more:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: circumcised the eighth day, of the stock of Israel, of the tribe of Benjamin, a Hebrew of Hebrews; concerning the law, a Pharisee;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: concerning zeal, persecuting the assembly; concerning the righteousness which is in the law, found blameless.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: However, I consider those things that were gain to me as a loss for Christ.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yes most certainly, and I count all things to be a loss for the excellency of the knowledge of Christ Jesus, my Lord, for whom I suffered the loss of all things, and count them nothing but refuse, that I may gain Christ

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and be found in him, not having a righteousness of my own, that which is of the law, but that which is through faith in Christ, the righteousness which is from God by faith;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: that I may know him, and the power of his resurrection, and the fellowship of his sufferings, becoming conformed to his death;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: if by any means I may attain to the resurrection from the dead.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Not that I have already obtained, or am already made perfect; but I press on, if it is so that I may take hold of that for which also I was taken hold of by Christ Jesus.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Brothers, I don’t regard myself as yet having taken hold, but one thing I do. Forgetting the things which are behind, and stretching forward to the things which are before,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I press on toward the goal for the prize of the high calling of God in Christ Jesus.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let us therefore, as many as are perfect, think this way. If in anything you think otherwise, God will also reveal that to you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Nevertheless, to the extent that we have already attained, let us walk by the same rule. Let us be of the same mind.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Brothers, be imitators together of me, and note those who walk this way, even as you have us for an example.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For many walk, of whom I told you often, and now tell you even weeping, as the enemies of the cross of Christ,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: whose end is destruction, whose god is the belly, and whose glory is in their shame, who think about earthly things.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For our citizenship is in heaven, from where we also wait for a Savior, the Lord Jesus Christ;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who will change the body of our humiliation to be conformed to the body of his glory, according to the working by which he is able even to subject all things to himself.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Therefore, my brothers, beloved and longed for, my joy and crown, so stand firm in the Lord, my beloved.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I exhort Euodia, and I exhort Syntyche, to think the same way in the Lord.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yes, I beg you also, true partner, help these women, for they labored with me in the Good News, with Clement also, and the rest of my fellow workers, whose names are in the book of life.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Rejoice in the Lord always! Again I will say, “Rejoice!”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let your gentleness be known to all men. The Lord is at hand.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: In nothing be anxious, but in everything, by prayer and petition with thanksgiving, let your requests be made known to God.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: And the peace of God, which surpasses all understanding, will guard your hearts and your thoughts in Christ Jesus.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Finally, brothers, whatever things are true, whatever things are honorable, whatever things are just, whatever things are pure, whatever things are lovely, whatever things are of good report; if there is any virtue, and if there is any praise, think about these things.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The things which you learned, received, heard, and saw in me: do these things, and the God of peace will be with you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But I rejoice in the Lord greatly, that now at length you have revived your thought for me; in which you did indeed take thought, but you lacked opportunity.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Not that I speak in respect to lack, for I have learned in whatever state I am, to be content in it.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I know how to be humbled, and I know also how to abound. In everything and in all things I have learned the secret both to be filled and to be hungry, both to abound and to be in need.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I can do all things through Christ, who strengthens me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: However you did well that you shared in my affliction.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You yourselves also know, you Philippians, that in the beginning of the Good News, when I departed from Macedonia, no assembly shared with me in the matter of giving and receiving but you only.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For even in Thessalonica you sent once and again to my need.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Not that I seek for the gift, but I seek for the fruit that increases to your account.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But I have all things, and abound. I am filled, having received from Epaphroditus the things that came from you, a sweet-smelling fragrance, an acceptable and well-pleasing sacrifice to God.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My God will supply every need of yours according to his riches in glory in Christ Jesus.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Now to our God and Father be the glory forever and ever! Amen.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Greet every saint in Christ Jesus. The brothers who are with me greet you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: All the saints greet you, especially those who are of Caesar’s household.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with you all. Amen.
